rationale: Active war continues as the dominant reality; Xi's Pyongyang visit is now confirmed and ongoing, sustaining the authoritarian axis that threatens Ukraine's long-term support environment, but no new qualitative escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit is now materialised and ongoing, deepening the Russia-China-North Korea axis. Already registered as an uptick last cycle; this cycle is continuation, but the axis remains a serious structural threat to Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US VP criticism of Netanyahu signals ongoing US attention split between Middle East and Ukraine; indirect relevance to Western bandwidth for Ukrainian support.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines leaves at least 37 dead
top_events.summary: Natural disaster in the Philippines; no relevance to Ukraine's war situation.
